thr06.scenario: B: DSR PASS + WFO FAIL → INCONCLUSIVE

thr07.scenario: B: DSR PASS + WFO FAIL → INCONCLUSIVE

analyst_dof_notes: DSR trivially PASS at N=52 (p≈1.0): observed SR ~1.35 >> SR₀ ~0.10. Even at N=700, DSR remains 1.0. The vol compression strategy's Sharpe is so far above the null benchmark that multiple testing correction cannot explain the result. M_eff correction (N=19) also trivially passes. WFO Bonferroni FAIL: Wilcoxon p (0.19-0.27) >> corrected α (0.0125). This is consistent with the known WFO power limitation at N=8 windows, not evidence against the mechanism.
